[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100001 3
1 1110000 3
2 0101110 4
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 0100001 2
7 0011000 2

01 10 0000000 a match 3 4 5
12 21 0001000 1
